extensionDescription.message: Completely prevent video and audio from auto-pausing when switching tabs, switching browsers (minimizing, or leaving the current browser, etc.) on selected domains.

extensionDescriptionChinese.message: 彻底阻止选中域名的网页因网页切换、浏览器切换（最小化，或者离开了当前浏览器等）所导致的视音频自动暂停

popupSubtitle.message: Selected domains stay visible, focused, and playing.

currentDomainButton.message: 添加当前域名 (Add current domain)

activeDomainUnavailable.message: The active tab domain is unavailable on this page.

footerNote.message: Use + to add a wildcard and - to remove it.

logActivated.message: Screw The Auto Pause is active for this selected domain.

logInactive.message: Screw The Auto Pause is inactive for this domain.

logStorageError.message: Screw The Auto Pause could not read saved rules.
